topIngredients.name: Beeswax
topIngredients.benefit: Natural occlusive that locks in moisture and smooths lip texture

topIngredients.name: Peppermint Oil
topIngredients.benefit: Natural flavoring with mild plumping effect from gentle vasodilation

topIngredients.name: Sweet Almond Oil
topIngredients.benefit: Nourishing oil rich in vitamin E and fatty acids

verdict: Burt's Bees 100% Natural formula has earned its iconic status through decades of consistent performance. The all-natural formula is ideal for those avoiding synthetic ingredients. The peppermint provides a refreshing tingle.
